details.test: Task 1: Save two modern single-family homes under $550k and 1800-2500 sq ft to favorites
Task 2: Request a quote for a similar 2022 kitchen-focused project
Task 3: Choose cheaper of two 3-bedroom plans under 2000 sq ft and request consultation
Task 4: Use cost calculator for 2200 sq ft modern home and request detailed estimate
Task 5: Save three 2023 sustainability-focused articles to reading list
Task 6: Find high-budget urban infill testimonial mentioning communication/timeline and reference it in contact inquiry
Task 7: Book an in-studio custom home consultation next month at 3:00 PM
Task 8: Find most expensive recent project (>=2020) and submit investor-style inquiry
